mechanism_narrative: Rising short-term policy rates increase the discount rate on future corporate earnings, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in rising rate periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in labor market conditions signals an approaching economic contraction, prompting equity investors to price in lower future cash flows and yielding negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the signal, or forward returns in rising unemployment periods do not statistically differ from flat unemployment periods.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production growth outpaces housing starts growth, it indicates a supply-constrained but demand-sustained economy that supports corporate profit margins, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction term's coefficient becomes statistically insignificant in a rolling regression, or forward returns are not higher when INDPRO growth exceeds HOUST growth.

mechanism_narrative: In a high-rate environment, rising consumer credit balances amplify debt-servicing burdens on households, leading to faster consumption slowdowns and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns in high-rate periods do not decline when RSAFS rises, or the predictive power vanishes when controlling for FEDFUNDS levels.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects robust labor demand that supports aggregate consumption and corporate revenues, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in payroll growth periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts below the 1800-unit threshold signals weakening construction demand and consumer confidence, which transmits to broader equity markets and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive or neutral when HOUST drops below the threshold, or the signal loses predictive power after controlling for CPIAUCSL trends.

mechanism_narrative: When real GDP growth decelerates while consumer credit balances continue to rise, it indicates a debt-fueled consumption slowdown that precedes earnings downgrades, yielding negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative returns in walk-forward tests, or forward returns are not significantly lower when GDPC1 growth falls below its 12-month moving average while RSAFS rises.

mechanism_narrative: In a supply-constrained regime where industrial production exceeds 110, firms possess pricing power that supports margin expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns do not increase when INDPRO exceeds the threshold, or the signal flips to negative during periods of high inflation (CPIAUCSL > 3% YoY).
